facade_axis_note: North facade: local x = -world x (local x increasing = world westward); local y = world z (up positive, ground z=0)

scale_origin.note: local origin = NE outer corner at ground (world x=10, world y=20, z=0); local x increases westward so world x = 10 - x_local; facade spans local x 0..10 (world x 10..0), z 0..4.5

strokes.note: F1 wall body (single floor, z 0.00-4.50); window and door openings overlay this fill
F1 large window (4800mm wide x 2400mm tall; sill z=1.00, head z=3.40; from bottom chain 540+4800 → x=0.54-5.34; height from left chain 1000+2400=3400)

dimensions.note: bottom sub-chain: east margin (local x=0 is NE corner)
bottom sub-chain: pier between window and door
left chain: floor to window sill
left chain: window head to roof
right chain: door threshold / sill step (200mm)
right chain: double door leaf height (z=0.20-2.60)
right chain: above door to roof (z=2.60-4.50)

unknowns_noted: outline not drawn as a separate stroke: coincides with wall_fill outer edges (flat roof, single floor) → redundant, not traced
north door (double-leaf with transom) at local x=7.86-9.46 not traced; it is a door, not a window pen; healed on plan side
transom window above north door not traced separately (part of door assembly, z ambiguous)
uncaptured_visual_elements: F1 north double door (double-leaf glazed door at local x=7.86-9.46, z≈0.20-2.60 with 200mm threshold) — recognized as door, not traced (door is not an elevation pen; healed on plan side S3)
transom above north door (local x=7.86-9.46, z≈2.60 to ~2.80) — part of door assembly; not traced
outline silhouette coincides with wall_fill edges (flat roof, single floor), not drawn separately
excluded green dimension chain terminator ticks and extension lines (annotation)
